package rulecoverage

func NegativeTemplateParseInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "template_parse_in_handler"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Template construction or parsing inside Gin handlers instead of startup-time caching."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
